---
title: "Modern AI, Under the Hood"
subtitle: "Deep technical notes on the modern AI stack — from model internals and generative modeling to inference systems, agents, and applied ML — with runnable code, math, benchmarks, and implementation details."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
listing:
  id: all-posts
  contents: notes
  type: default
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
---

::: {.grid .home-cards}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .home-card}
### 🧮 [Foundations](fundamentals.qmd)
Tensors, optimization, classical ML, training loops and architectures - the building blocks behind modern AI systems.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .home-card}
### ⚙️ [LLM Systems](llm-systems.qmd)
Tensors, optimization, classical ML, training loops, architectures, and vision - the building blocks behind modern AI systems.
:::

:::
